---
title: "Welcome to the Course Portal"
---

This is the central hub for all my course materials. Each course is maintained as an independent Quarto book.

## Available Courses

::: {layout-nb="[[1,1,1,1]]"}

### Semester 1
{{< include _1sem_list.qmd >}}

### Semester 2
{{< include _2sem_list.qmd >}}

### Semester 3
{{< include _3sem_list.qmd >}}

### Semester 4
{{< include _4sem_list.qmd >}}

:::

Choose a course from the list above or use the navigation bar to get started.
